INSERT INTO app.helpdesk_logs (log_type, inquiry_id, user_id, channel_id, evaluation, evaluation_comment, thread_ts, created_at)
VALUES ('EVALUATION', {{ $json.log_id || 'NULL' }}, '{{ $json.user_id }}', '{{ $json.channel_id }}', '{{ $json.evaluation }}', '{{ ($json.comment || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.thread_ts }}', NOW())
RETURNING id

UPDATE app.helpdesk_logs SET status = 'HUMAN_REQUESTED' WHERE id = {{ $json.log_id }};
UPDATE {{ $json.tableName }} SET status = 'HUMAN_REQUESTED', urgency = 'LOW' WHERE ticket_id = '{{ $json.ticket_id }}';

UPDATE app.helpdesk_logs SET status = 'ESCALATED' WHERE id = {{ $json.log_id }};
UPDATE {{ $json.tableName }} SET status = 'ESCALATED' WHERE ticket_id = '{{ $json.ticket_id }}';
